Notice Of Application And Application For Right To Attach Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment
Off Calendar Feb-25-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Erin H. Welsch, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: ONE EMBARCADERO CENTER VENTURE
Defendant Ellison C. Morgan, opposing party in Propria Persona

After hearing, tentative ruling is adopted. PLAINTIFF ONE EMBARCADERO CENTER VENTURE'S Application For Writ Of Attachment as to Defendant Ellison Christopher Morgan is granted in the amount of $581,849.02. The undertaking is set in the amount of $10,000. The writ may issue as to the real property described in the application, accounts receivable, final money judgments, and money on the premises where a trade, business, or profession is conducted by defendant as described in item 5. Those are the items sufficiently described to meet the requirements of describing the property of a natural person.
Plaintiff's evidentiary objections to the declaration of Lisa Wills are sustained.
Plaintiff's evidentiary objections to the declaration of Ellison C. Morgan are sustained.
Order signed in open court. Commissioner Everett A. Hewlett. Not reported.
